# 🌍 Code of Conduct

## 🤝 Our Pledge

We as contributors and maintainers of
**GradeEvaluator AI** pledge to make participation
in our project a harassment-free experience for
everyone, regardless of age, body size, disability,
ethnicity, gender identity, level of experience,
nationality, personal appearance, race, religion
or sexual identity and orientation.

We pledge to act and interact in ways that
contribute to an open, welcoming, diverse,
inclusive and healthy community.

---

## 📋 Our Standards

### ✅ Expected Behavior
- 😊 Be kind, respectful and welcoming to all
- 💬 Use inclusive and professional language
- 🔄 Give and gracefully accept constructive feedback
- ❤️ Show empathy toward other community members
- 🎯 Focus on what is best for the community
- 🌱 Respect differing viewpoints and experiences
- 🙏 Credit others for their contributions

### ❌ Unacceptable Behavior
- 🚫 Harassment, insults, or discriminatory comments
- 🚫 Trolling or deliberately disruptive behavior
- 🚫 Publishing others' private information without consent
- 🚫 Sexual language or imagery of any kind
- 🚫 Personal or political attacks
- 🚫 Any conduct that would be considered
  inappropriate in a professional setting

---

## 👮 Our Responsibilities

Project maintainers are responsible for clarifying
the standards of acceptable behavior and will take
appropriate and fair corrective action in response
to any behavior they deem inappropriate, threatening,
offensive or harmful.

Maintainers have the right to remove, edit, or reject
comments, commits, code, issues and other contributions
that do not align with this Code of Conduct.

---

## 🌐 Scope

This Code of Conduct applies within all project spaces
including:

- 💻 GitHub issues and pull requests
- 💬 Project discussions and comments
- 📧 Official project email communications
- 🌍 Any other official project channels

---

## 🚨 Enforcement

Instances of abusive, harassing, or otherwise
unacceptable behavior may be reported by contacting
the project maintainer directly:

**👨‍💻 Gemachis Tesfaye**
📧 gemachistesfaye36@gmail.com
🔗 [github.com/gemachistesfaye](https://github.com/gemachistesfaye)

All complaints will be:
- 🔍 Reviewed and investigated promptly
- 🔒 Handled with discretion and confidentiality
- ⚖️ Responded to with fair and appropriate action

---

## ⚖️ Enforcement Guidelines

| Severity | Violation | Consequence |
|---|---|---|
| 🟡 Minor | Inappropriate language or tone | Private written warning |
| 🟠 Moderate | Repeated violations or mild harassment | Temporary suspension |
| 🔴 Severe | Sustained harassment or hate speech | Permanent ban |

---

## 🏆 Recognition

We also believe in recognizing positive contributions:

- 🌟 Outstanding contributors will be acknowledged
  in the project README
- 💡 Great ideas and suggestions are always welcome
- 🎓 We support students and first-time contributors
  especially — everyone starts somewhere!

---

## 📜 Attribution

This Code of Conduct is adapted from the
[Contributor Covenant](https://www.contributor-covenant.org),
version 2.1, available at
https://www.contributor-covenant.org/version/2/1/code_of_conduct.html
